## SDK Impact Check
- [ ] This task does NOT add > 2ms SDK overhead to LLM calls
- [ ] If changing SDK API: semantic version bump defined (patch / minor / major)
- [ ] Observer principle maintained: SDK does not alter LLM call behavior

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] Tests passing (≥ 80% coverage; SDK matrix: Python 3.9–3.12, JS Node 18/20)
- [ ] Security scan clean
- [ ] No file exceeds 333 lines (**333-Line Law**)
- [ ] Docs/CHANGELOG updated

## Constitutional Compliance
- [ ] Vedantic check complete
- [ ] `// reason:` comment on non-obvious decisions
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Handoff-ready output
